propositions: The gerrit-verify build-and-test test step should run under pytest-xdist pinned to the runner's core count to cut test-step wall clock from ~22 min to ~6 min.
Coverage must remain enabled and reported coverage under xdist must equal the serial value and stay at or above fail_under=70 with no orphaned .coverage.* files leaking into the checkout.
Test outcomes under xdist must be identical to serial with no new failures or isolation/leak-guard regressions.
pip caching should be added to all setup-python steps so repeat-run install time is reduced.
Every gate run should log its slowest tests via --durations with an optional .test_durations store.
docs/coverage.md and CI docs must be updated to note the xdist plus parallel=true coverage-combine requirement.
